failures.error_message: iNova repository is not accessible in this cloud execution environment. git clone via HTTPS with GITHUB_PAT_QA_BOT returned HTTP 403 — 'Write access to repository not granted'. GitHub MCP tools also restricted to rsa-data-solutions/always-on-engineering-fleet only. No tests could run.

notes: RECURRING (day 10): env_problem — iNova repo unreachable in cloud session for 10 consecutive days (2026-05-20 through 2026-05-29). GITHUB_PAT_QA_BOT lacks read scope on RSA-Data-Solutions/iNova (HTTP 403). ACTION REQUIRED: grant GITHUB_PAT_QA_BOT read access to RSA-Data-Solutions/iNova, OR provision a new PAT with repo:read scope and add as session secret GITHUB_PAT_INOVA_READ.
